description: Agent 5 multiplayer hub route/status metadata for RmlUi ownership and starter progression tracking.

status_values.starter: Starter RML document exists in Agent 5-owned assets and preserves representative multiplayer hub command/navigation hooks.

migration_phase_values.starter: Source RML document and static route metadata exist; runtime, controller, and parity evidence are pending.
migration_phase_values.controller_stub: Controller/data-model stub metadata exists, but live runtime validation is pending.
migration_phase_values.runtime_stub: Runtime smoke/open path exists for this route, but parity evidence is pending.
migration_phase_values.parity_pending: Route opens through RmlUi with live bridge coverage; parity evidence is still incomplete.
migration_phase_values.parity_ready: Route has accepted parity evidence and is ready for cutover consideration.

controller_contracts.notes: q2servers.com browsing, address-book browsing, demo browsing, start-server setup defaults, player setup, Options, Back, and Close controls expose static command hooks that mirror the legacy multiplayer hub.
Command controls declare static data-route-target metadata for servers, demos, startserver, players, and options while retaining legacy pushmenu command strings.

routes.notes: Static RML declares the legacy multiplayer hub options with RmlUi shell styling, menu music/open sound metadata, a no-session fallback summary, and command/route-target pairs for q2servers.com, address-book, demos, startserver, players, and options. Full live multiplayer controller binding remains pending, so runtime data-model bindings are intentionally deferred to avoid missing-model warnings.
